mapper.sql: Id, InvoiceNo, CaseNo, OrderNo, RorderNo_All, CustomerNo, ModelNo, Quantity, TransType, ImpDate, ProdCountry, OptCode, StateFlag, ExpDesc, BarCode, OrdFlag, QtyImp, OptFlag, LabelPrtFlag, AsseFlag, InvFlag, PreNo, UserName, OptTime, SmcCode, OptRecord, OrdType, unitWeight, SerialNo
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.impdata_bak
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.impdata_bak (Id, InvoiceNo, CaseNo, OrderNo, RorderNo_All, CustomerNo, ModelNo, Quantity, TransType, ImpDate, ProdCountry, OptCode, StateFlag, ExpDesc, BarCode, OrdFlag, QtyImp, OptFlag, LabelPrtFlag, AsseFlag, InvFlag, PreNo, UserName, OptTime, SmcCode, OptRecord, OrdType, unitWeight, SerialNo) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{caseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rordernoAll,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{transtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{impdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{prodcountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{optcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stateflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expdesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ordflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qtyimp,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{optflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{labelprtflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{asseflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{preno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{smccode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{optrecord,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ordtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitweight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{serialno,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

mapper.update:
update dbo.impdata_bak
Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
InvoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CaseNo = #{record.caseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OrderNo = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RorderNo_All = #{record.rordernoAll,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
TransType = #{record.transtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ImpDate = #{record.impdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ProdCountry = #{record.prodcountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OptCode = #{record.optcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
StateFlag = #{record.stateflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ExpDesc = #{record.expdesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BarCode = #{record.barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OrdFlag = #{record.ordflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QtyImp = #{record.qtyimp,jdbcType=INTEGER},
OptFlag = #{record.optflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LabelPrtFlag = #{record.labelprtflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AsseFlag = #{record.asseflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InvFlag = #{record.invflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PreNo = #{record.preno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UserName = #{record.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OptTime = #{record.opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
SmcCode = #{record.smccode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OptRecord = #{record.optrecord,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OrdType = #{record.ordtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
unitWeight = #{record.unitweight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
SerialNo = #{record.serialno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.impdata_bak set Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, InvoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CaseNo = #{record.caseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OrderNo = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RorderNo_All = #{record.rordernoAll,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, TransType = #{record.transtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ImpDate = #{record.impdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ProdCountry = #{record.prodcountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OptCode = #{record.optcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, StateFlag = #{record.stateflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ExpDesc = #{record.expdesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BarCode = #{record.barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OrdFlag = #{record.ordflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, QtyImp = #{record.qtyimp,jdbcType=INTEGER}, OptFlag = #{record.optflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LabelPrtFlag = #{record.labelprtflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AsseFlag = #{record.asseflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, InvFlag = #{record.invflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PreNo = #{record.preno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UserName = #{record.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OptTime = #{record.opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, SmcCode = #{record.smccode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OptRecord = #{record.optrecord,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OrdType = #{record.ordtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, unitWeight = #{record.unitweight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, SerialNo = #{record.serialno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
